exemplars.text: Insight deepens your creative spark.
Emotion and power are not opposites. You embody both.
Your playful mind holds deep compassion at its core.
Freedom rests on your inner discipline.
You nurture growth through consistent care.
Loyalty shapes how you speak: with care, with conviction.
exemplars.original: Loyalty shapes how you speak—with care, with conviction.

exemplars.text: You create space where understanding can settle.
You hold curiosity with care, letting it deepen rather than scatter.
You channel power through presence, not performance.
You embody strength that does not seek applause.
Your warmth invites trust; your resolve maintains it.
Playfulness serves your discerning mind.
Subtle perception guides your steady path.
Vision deepens through your intuitive knowing.
Sensitivity strengthens your steadfast presence.
You cultivate depth through quiet empathy.
You honor freedom that fosters connection.
Curiosity roots your sense of direction.
You blend wisdom with a restless spirit.
You speak truths honed by deep reflection.
You protect without performance. The people who know you feel it.
You shed what no longer fits. Not out of urgency, but wisdom.
You channel ambition through grounded action.
You elevate ideas into transformative action.
You spark curiosity that leads to growth.
You leap on instinct and land where others only hope to aim.
exemplars.original: You leap on instinct—and land where others only hope to aim.

exemplars.text: You guard space for others to be wholly seen.
Thought moves through you like wind through stone: shaping, never eroding.
exemplars.original: Thought moves through you like wind through stone—shaping, never eroding.

exemplars.text: You spark possibility with bold curiosity.
Your compassion elevates, inviting others to expand.
You protect fairness with unwavering heart.
Your nurturing energy shapes lasting beauty.
Each deliberate act builds trust that lasts.
You inspire renewal through gentle persistence.
You chart new territory with thoughtful steps.
Your ambition aligns with inner wisdom.
You pursue freedom with clarity, not haste.
Your curiosity channels profound transformation.
When you strike, it is with full presence.
Movement is meaningful when aligned with purpose.
Compassion fuels your tireless pursuit of better.
You turn curiosity into pathways for change.
Curiosity moves like fire in you: messy, bright, essential.
exemplars.original: Curiosity moves like fire in you—messy, bright, essential.

exemplars.text: You offer insight that settles softly but stays firm.
exemplars.original: You offer insight that lands softly but stays firm.

exemplars.text: You offer steadiness in dialogue. That’s why your words carry weight.
You chase ideas with open hands, knowing when to hold and when to release.
You embody leadership that uplifts rather than commands.
You carry leadership in motion, paced by integrity.
You ride change with an open, thoughtful heart.
You create harmony where others seek control.
You build belonging through heartfelt presence.
You cultivate connection through soulful kindness.
You bridge imagination and grounded wisdom.
You lead with insight sharpened by perspective.
You turn curiosity into transformative insight.
You cultivate connection that resonates beyond the moment.
You shape outcomes with subtle yet certain touch.

anti_examples.text: Loyalty sits in your bones. It doesn’t bend. It anchors.
Insight moves through your thoughtful cadence.
Creativity rests on your compassionate foundation.
Your perception pierces the surface with grace.
You spark movement where others see walls.
Creativity flows from the care you pour into each moment.
You weave words into sparks. Each one has weight.
You inspire movement without demand—others rise in your presence.
You uplift others through intuitive generosity.
Strength moves beneath your calm exterior.
You guard what others forget—until they remember who you are.
You move with warmth sharp enough to carve space for others. And yourself.
You don’t chase what’s yours. You prepare, then meet it fully.

reword_candidates.text: You build beauty that doesn’t explain itself. It roots in your hands and endures.
reword_candidates.note: not x but y, but concept is good

reword_candidates.text: You run on instinct, but rest with intention. Freedom is how you breathe.
You anchor others through presence alone. It is enough.
